paracontent_tesim: The [copying of the] sacred teachings … were finished during the day of Friday 4 in the month of Ādhār [March] in the Year of Our Father Adam [Anno Mundi] 6752, and it was copied by … [difficult to read] at Lady ‘Ammāriyah[?] Church …

نزجت التعاليم المقدسة الاسطوديون نهار الجمعة الرابع في شهر آذار التاريخ الثاني أحادي سنة ستالف وسبعمائه واثنين وخمسين سنة لأبينا آدم / كتب العبد الخاطئ ؟ بكنيسة السيدة ؟  رحمة الله ورحم والديه ومن ترحم عليهم آمين

Rodent damage affecting text on ff. 1–2
Teaching and Homilies of St. Theodore, Abbot of the Monastery of Stodion

The [copying of the] sacred teachings … were finished during the day of Friday 4 in the month of Ādhār [March] in the Year of Our Father Adam [Anno Mundi] 6752, and it was copied by … [difficult to read] at Lady ‘Ammāriyah[?] Church …
